---
title: "Simple MC Quiz"
---

# Simple MC Quiz

Answer all questions carefully.

## Question 1 [10 pts]

What is the sample mean of the dataset {2, 4, 6}?

a) 3
b) 4 [x]
c) 5
d) 6

## Question 2 [10 pts]

Which measure of central tendency is most affected by outliers?

a) Median
b) Mode
c) Mean [x]
d) Range

## Question 3 [10 pts]

A Type I error occurs when we:

a) Fail to reject a true null hypothesis
b) Reject a true null hypothesis [x]
c) Accept a false null hypothesis
d) Reject a false null hypothesis
